name: PM-KISAN
description: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi provides income support to all landholding farmers' families across India.
benefit: ₹6000 per year in three equal installments

name: PMFBY
description: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana offers comprehensive crop insurance against natural calamities, pests, and diseases.
benefit: Crop loss compensation up to 100% of sum insured

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Provides soil health cards to farmers which carry crop-wise recommendations of nutrients and fertilizers required for the individual farms.
benefit: Free soil testing and fertilizer recommendations

name: Kisan Credit Card
description: Provides adequate and timely credit support from the banking system to farmers for their cultivation and other needs.
benefit: Credit up to ₹3 lakh with low interest rates

name: National Agriculture Market (eNAM)
description: An online trading platform for agricultural commodities to create a unified national market for agricultural commodities.
benefit: Better price discovery and direct marketing

name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayi Yojana (PMKSY)
description: Focuses on creating sources for assured irrigation and also creating protective irrigation by harnessing rainwater.

name: National Mission on Oilseeds and Oil Palm (NMOOP)
description: Aims to increase production of oilseeds and oil palm to reduce import dependence and ensure edible oil security.
benefit: Subsidies for oilseed cultivation and processing

name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY)
description: Aims at achieving 4% annual growth in agriculture through development of agriculture and its allied sectors.
benefit: Financial assistance for various agricultural activities

name: National Food Security Mission (NFSM)
description: Aims to increase production of rice, wheat, pulses, coarse cereals and commercial crops through area expansion and productivity enhancement.
benefit: Subsidies for seeds, fertilizers, and equipment

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
description: Promotes organic farming practices through adoption of organic village clusters and certification of organic products.
